name: Bhavani Kotha
bio: Bhavani Kotha enjoys a varied career of freelance performing and teaching oboe. She enjoys playing with various ensembles and recently played as a guest musician with the Seattle Symphony, Fifth Avenue Theatre, and the Oregon Symphony. She also performed as a soloist with the Seattle Festival Orchestra and with North Corner Chamber Orchestra. She enjoys coaching students at the Seattle Youth Symphony Orchestra's chamber music program. She holds degrees from the University of Washington and the University of Southern California Thornton School of Music.
